expenses.description: Afternoon session - comprehensive MC update, 8 commits, server restarts, 75K tokens
Nightly work session Feb 27 - Mission Control review, 2 tasks completed

memories.content: Budget is $200/month for all API calls and infrastructure
Uses mixed model routing: Gemini (free), DeepSeek (cheap), Kimi (quality)
All PRs require approval before merging - no automatic shipping
Ghost-Shifts run every 12 hours (12pm & 12am PST) - autonomous work sessions that read Mission Control, execute AI-Ready tasks, and report to Discord
Ben's Bites Scanner runs weekly (Wed & Fri 6am PST) - scans newsletter, implements HIGH priority tools, opens DRAFT PRs, reports to Discord
Startup 1: dAIcor Inc - E-commerce platform with Stability AI and Printify APIs, 482 customers, 40% EBITDA, 90.12% monthly growth
Startup 2: Sumer Inc - Website/app platform, raised $250K, $1M valuation, 2,200 customers, 72.81% quarterly growth
Mohammed Rayed Wasif, CPA - Indian heritage, San Francisco CA, University of Toronto BBA Accounting 3.7 GPA
Current role: Senior Associate at Siegfried Group (July '25 - Present), AI automation and Workato
Previous: Senior Accountant 2 at Deloitte (Sept '22 - July '25), led audits for PE/healthcare/VC clients
